📜 Daemonologie King James I

Daemonologie

King James I
A historical treatise on witchcraft and the occult, written by King James I of England. A significant work in the study of demonology and spiritual warfare.

📜 Old Testament Theology Ingrid Faro, Ph.D.

Old Testament Theology

Ingrid Faro, Ph.D.
A study guide to Old Testament theology — exploring major themes, the mission of God, Messianic prophecy, and how Scripture applies to the Christian life.
